LightningComponentBundle.description: Reusable related list for any child object. Configure object, parent lookup, fields, and new-record behavior directly in Lightning App Builder.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Record Object API Name (System)
property.description: System-provided by Lightning record pages. Do not use for related child object configuration.

property.name: childObjectApiName
property.label: Child Object API Name
property.description: API name of the related object to query (example: Program_Dates__c).

property.name: parentFieldApiName
property.label: Parent Lookup Field API Name
property.description: Lookup/master-detail field on the child object that points to this record (example: Account__c).

property.name: parentRecordIdSourceFieldApiName
property.label: Parent Id Source Field API Name
property.description: Optional field on this record whose Id value will be used as the parent filter Id (example: Account__c, Opportunity__c).

property.name: relationshipApiName
property.label: Relationship API Name
property.description: Relationship API name used for header/View All navigation (example: Program_Dates__r).

property.name: fieldApiNamesCsv
property.label: Fields (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated field API names to query (example: Requirement_Type__c,Status__c,Completed__c).

property.name: relationshipFieldApiNamesCsv
property.label: Relationship Fields (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated relationship fields to query (example: Vendor_Program__r.Label__c).

property.name: columnFieldApiNamesCsv
property.label: Auto Column Fields (CSV)
property.description: Optional columns for auto-generation. If blank, uses Fields (CSV).

property.name: columnsJson
property.label: Column JSON Override
property.description: Optional JSON array of lightning-datatable columns. Overrides auto-generated columns when provided.

property.name: linkFieldApiName
property.label: Link Field API Name
property.description: Optional field rendered as a clickable record link when using auto-generated columns.

property.name: enableInlineEdit
property.label: Enable Inline Edit
property.description: Allows inline editing for updateable fields in auto-generated columns.

property.name: readOnlyFieldApiNamesCsv
property.label: Read Only Fields (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated field API names that should always be read-only (example: Completed__c).

property.name: readOnlyTreatAsTextFieldApiNamesCsv
property.label: Read Only & Treat As Text (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated fields rendered as read-only text (example: Requirement_Type__c).

property.name: excludeRowsWhereCsv
property.label: Exclude Rows Where (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated exclusions in format FieldApiName=value (example: Field=created).

property.name: orderByField
property.label: Order By Field API Name
property.description: Field used for ordering query results.

property.name: orderDirection
property.label: Order Direction
property.description: Sort direction for query results.

property.name: recordLimit
property.label: Record Limit
property.description: Optional max records to query (default 2000, max 10000).

property.name: newActionBehavior
property.label: New Button Behavior
property.description: auto: modal when child component is set, else standard New page.

property.name: childComponent
property.label: Modal Child Component Name
property.description: Optional child component used for modal create flow (example: programDatesScreenAction).

property.name: defaultFieldValuesCsv
property.label: Default Field Values (CSV)
property.description: Optional defaults for standard New action in format Field__c=value,Field2__c=value2.

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title Override
property.description: Optional modal title override.

property.name: objectLabel
property.label: Object Label Override
property.description: Optional label override used in headers and toasts.

property.name: headerTitleOverride
property.label: Header Title Override
property.description: Optional custom header title. Supports {count} token.

property.name: itemCountLabelOverride
property.label: Item Count Label Override
property.description: Optional custom subheader text under the title.
